title: senecio quinquelobus
intro: Senecio quinquelobus, also known as five-lobed ragwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Senecio quinquelobus are attributed to its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Senecio quinquelobus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in traditional folk medicine.
